Node.help: This singleton represents the TestServer process. It is used to manage sessions and help in regression testing.

Event.name: InvalidateObjectEvent
Event.help: Event indicates what object was changed on the server side

Method2.name: GetClassMetaSchema
Method2.help: Return the metaschema definition for the requested object class.

Argument.name: type
Argument.help: The object class type to return the metaschema definition for.

Method2.name: Ping
Method2.help: An empty method used for basic communications testing

Method2.name: OpenSession
Method2.help: Create a session. Sessions contain, configure and run a test. Sessions can be viewed by more than one client, but edited only by one client.

Argument.name: sessionName
Argument.help: The name of the session to remind the user what the session is for.

Argument.name: inactivityTimeout
Argument.help: Zero for no timeout, otherwise a value in ms. [Not implemented]

Argument.name: session
Argument.help: A reference to the created session.

Method2.name: OpenSession
Method2.help: Create a session. Sessions contain, configure and run a test. Sessions can be viewed by more than one client, but edited only by one client.

Argument.name: appName
Argument.help: The name of the application. This argument is used to keep save files of different applications in different places.

Argument.name: sessionName
Argument.help: The name of the session to remind the user what the session is for.

Argument.name: inactivityTimeout
Argument.help: Zero for no timeout, otherwise a value in ms. [Not implemented]

Argument.name: session
Argument.help: A reference to the created session.
